problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion may resolve Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
